nasb.text: When the whirlwind passes, the wicked is no more, But the righteous has an everlasting foundation.

esv.text: When the tempest passes, the wicked is no more, but the righteous is established forever.

cnv.text: 暴風一過，惡人就歸於無有， 義人卻有永遠的根基。

ccb.text: 暴风扫过， 恶人消逝无踪， 义人永不动摇。

csbs.text: 旋风一过，恶人就不复存在； 而义人却有永远的根基。
